instruction: Classify the support ticket into a priority/type bucket.
baseline_prompt: You are a support-priority classifier. Classify the support ticket into a priority/type bucket. Classify into one of these categories: outage_critical, data_loss, billing, feature_request, how_to, integration.
source: Authored for TEI-Bench (Sonnet-generated, Sonnet-validated; kept only label-agreed examples).

train.query: Complete system failure started approximately 30 minutes ago. The dashboard shows all services as unavailable and we're receiving reports from users across all departments that they cannot access the platform at all. This is a company-wide impact.

After the latest system update, approximately 200 files from our shared document repository are no longer accessible. When we try to open them, we get error messages indicating the files cannot be found. These contained critical project documentation.
My credit card on file expired and I need to update the payment method before the next cycle. Where can I add my new card details?

Is there any chance of adding custom field validation rules? We need to enforce specific formats for phone numbers and ID fields based on our regional requirements, and the current system doesn't allow this level of customization.
What are the best practices for organizing projects using tags versus folders? I want to make sure our team structure is optimized before we migrate all our existing content.

Our Salesforce connector stopped syncing customer records about two hours ago. The webhook delivery logs show 500 errors on your end, and we're not receiving any callback notifications. This is blocking our sales team from accessing updated contact information.

All authentication services appear to be non-functional. Every single user attempting to access the platform is getting error messages and cannot proceed past the login screen. We have over 10,000 active users affected right now.

Something went wrong during our database migration and now we're missing an entire table containing product inventory data. The table structure exists but all rows have been wiped out. We need this restored immediately.
Our company upgraded to the enterprise plan three weeks ago but we're still being invoiced at the professional tier rate. Can someone review our account and adjust the pricing?

Could you consider implementing role-based dashboard views? Our executives need different metrics than our operations team, and having customizable layouts per user role would streamline everyone's experience.
Could someone clarify the process for whitelisting IP addresses? I want to restrict access to our dashboard to only our office network but I'm not sure where this setting is located.

The SAML SSO configuration with our Okta identity provider is rejecting login attempts. Users get an error message saying 'Invalid ACS URL' even though we've triple-checked the assertion consumer service endpoint matches your metadata file exactly.

Total platform unavailability for the last 20 minutes - no pages are loading, all API calls are failing, and our monitoring shows everything is down. We have critical business processes completely halted with thousands of users impacted.

I exported a report yesterday with 5,000 rows of transaction records, but when I opened it this morning, only the headers are present and all the actual entries are gone. The file size also dropped from 2MB to just a few KB.
I was charged twice this month for my subscription and need a refund for the duplicate transaction. My account shows two withdrawals of $49.99 on the same day.

test.query: It would be incredibly helpful if users could schedule reports to run automatically and email to specified recipients weekly. Right now we're manually generating and sending these every Monday morning.
I'm trying to set up automated email notifications for new user registrations, but I can't find where to configure the SMTP settings in the admin panel. Could someone walk me through the steps?

We're trying to connect our CRM system to your platform using the REST endpoints, but we keep getting 401 authentication errors even though our API key is valid. The OAuth token refresh flow seems to be failing after the initial handshake completes successfully.

The entire infrastructure seems to have crashed. We're seeing database connection failures, application servers not responding, and zero availability across all modules. This is blocking our entire organization from conducting business operations.

We ran a routine backup restore test and discovered that our backup from last week is incomplete - several critical folders are missing entirely and others contain files that won't open or appear to be truncated.
The annual subscription renewal went through but we actually wanted to downgrade to the monthly plan instead. Is it possible to get prorated and switch?

Our workflow would benefit significantly from bulk export functionality. Currently we have to download reports one at a time, which becomes tedious when dealing with multiple clients. Can this be added to the roadmap?
I'm looking for guidance on setting up two-factor authentication for all users in our organization. Is this configured at the individual level or can it be enforced globally through admin settings?

Our mobile app uses your SDK to handle payment processing, but after updating to version 3.2.1, the callback methods aren't firing when transactions complete. The payment goes through on your side, but our app never receives the success or failure response, leaving users stuck on a loading screen.

URGENT: The main API endpoint is returning 503 errors and has been down for over an hour. This is affecting all of our client applications and nobody can use any part of the system. We have hundreds of users unable to complete their work.

We just noticed that all customer records from the past 3 months have disappeared from our database. We had over 15,000 entries and now we're only seeing historical data from before June. This is extremely urgent as we cannot access any recent customer information.
Our finance department needs itemized receipts for the last six months of transactions for tax purposes. How can we obtain these documents?
I'd love to see calendar integration so appointments automatically sync with Google Calendar and Outlook. This would eliminate the manual double-entry we're doing right now.
I need help understanding the difference between webhook and API polling for syncing data. Which approach should I use for real-time updates, and where do I configure the endpoint URLs?

I'm following the documentation to set up the Zapier connection, but the authorization step keeps timing out. When I click 'Connect Account' it redirects to your auth page, then spins indefinitely without completing. Can someone verify if the OAuth redirect URI is configured correctly?

Our entire production environment has been inaccessible for the past 45 minutes. None of our 2,000+ employees can log in to the platform and all customer-facing services are completely unavailable. This is causing massive business disruption and we need immediate assistance.

Half of our uploaded images from the media library have become corrupted and won't display anymore. They show as broken links and when we try to re-access them, we get file not found errors. This affects roughly 3,000 assets.
I'm seeing charges for 15 user seats but we only have 12 active team members on our account. Could you please verify the seat count and correct our next statement?
